SELECT
  CAST("Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" AS REAL) / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS eligible_free_rate
FROM frpm
WHERE
  "Educational Option Type" = 'Continuation School'
  AND "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 0
ORDER BY
  eligible_free_rate ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 3

SELECT
  T1."School Name",
  CAST(T1."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" AS REAL) / T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS eligible_free_rate
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2
  ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE
  T2.EdOpsName = 'Continuation School' AND T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 0
ORDER BY
  eligible_free_rate ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 3

SELECT
  T1."School Name",
  T1."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)",
  T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)",
  CAST(T1."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" AS REAL) / T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS eligible_free_rate
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2
  ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
JOIN satscores AS T3
  ON T2.CDSCode = T3.cds
WHERE
  T1."Educational Option Type" = 'Continuation School'
  AND T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 0
ORDER BY
  eligible_free_rate ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 3

SELECT DISTINCT
  CAST("Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" AS REAL) / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS eligible_free_rate
FROM frpm
WHERE

  AND "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 0
ORDER BY
  eligible_free_rate ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 3

SELECT
  T1."FRPM Count (K-12)"
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2

JOIN satscores AS T3
  ON T2.CDSCode = T3.cds
ORDER BY

LIMIT 1

SELECT
  SUM(T1.wins),
  T2.forename,
  T2.surname
FROM driverStandings AS T1
JOIN drivers AS T2
  ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId
WHERE
  T2.dob = (
    SELECT
      MIN(dob)
    FROM drivers
  )

  )

SELECT
  T3.position
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN lapTimes AS T3
  ON T1.driverId = T3.driverId
JOIN drivers AS T5
  ON T4.driverId = T5.driverId
WHERE
  T1.forename = 'Lewis'
  AND T1.surname = 'Hamilton'
  AND T3.time = (
    SELECT
      MIN(T4.time)
    FROM lapTimes AS T4
    JOIN drivers AS T5
      ON T4.driverId = T5.driverId
    WHERE
      T5.forename = 'Lewis' AND T5.surname = 'Hamilton'
  )

SELECT
  T4.duration
FROM circuits AS T1
JOIN races AS T2
  ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId
JOIN lapTimes AS T3
  ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId
JOIN pitStops AS T4
  ON T3.raceId = T4.raceId AND T3.driverId = T4.driverId
JOIN races AS R
  ON L.raceId = R.raceId
JOIN circuits AS C
  ON R.circuitId = C.circuitId
WHERE
  T1.name LIKE '%Austrian%'
  AND T3.milliseconds = (
    SELECT
      MIN(L.milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes AS L
    JOIN races AS R
      ON L.raceId = R.raceId
    JOIN circuits AS C
      ON R.circuitId = C.circuitId
    WHERE
      C.name LIKE '%Austrian%'
  )

JOIN races AS R
  ON L.raceId = R.raceId
JOIN circuits AS C
  ON R.circuitId = C.circuitId
WHERE
  T1.name LIKE '%Austrian%'
  AND T3.milliseconds = (
    SELECT
      MIN(L.milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes AS L
    JOIN races AS R
      ON L.raceId = R.raceId
    JOIN circuits AS C
      ON R.circuitId = C.circuitId
    WHERE
      C.name LIKE '%Austrian%'
  )

JOIN races AS R

  T2.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix'
  AND T3.milliseconds = (
    SELECT
      MIN(L.milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes AS L
    JOIN races AS R
      ON L.raceId = R.raceId
    WHERE
      R.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix'
  )

WHERE
  T1.name LIKE '%Austrian%'
  AND T3.milliseconds = (
    SELECT

    FROM lapTimes AS L
    JOIN races AS R
      ON L.raceId = R.raceId
    JOIN circuits AS C
      ON R.circuitId = C.circuitId
    WHERE
      C.name LIKE '%Austrian%'
  )

SELECT
  AVG(T4.milliseconds)
FROM circuits AS T1
JOIN races AS T2
  ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId
JOIN lapTimes AS T3
  ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId
JOIN pitStops AS T4
  ON T2.raceId = T4.raceId AND T3.driverId = T4.driverId
JOIN races AS R
  ON L.raceId = R.raceId
JOIN circuits AS C
  ON R.circuitId = C.circuitId
WHERE
  T1.name LIKE '%Austrian%'
  AND T3.milliseconds = (
    SELECT
      MIN(L.milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes AS L
    JOIN races AS R
      ON L.raceId = R.raceId
    JOIN circuits AS C
      ON R.circuitId = C.circuitId
    WHERE
      C.name LIKE '%Austrian%'
  )

SELECT
  T4.duration
FROM circuits AS T1
JOIN races AS T2
  ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId
JOIN lapTimes AS T3
  ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId
JOIN pitStops AS T4
  ON T2.raceId = T4.raceId AND T3.driverId = T4.driverId
WHERE
  T1.name LIKE '%Austrian%'
GROUP BY
  T3.driverId,
  T3.raceId
HAVING
  T3.milliseconds = MIN(T3.milliseconds)

  T4.duration
FROM races AS T2
JOIN lapTimes AS T3
  ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId
JOIN pitStops AS T4
  ON T3.raceId = T4.raceId AND T3.driverId = T4.driverId
JOIN races AS R
  ON L.raceId = R.raceId
WHERE
  T2.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix'
  AND T3.milliseconds = (
    SELECT
      MIN(L.milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes AS L
    JOIN races AS R
      ON L.raceId = R.raceId
    WHERE
      R.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix'
  )

JOIN Player AS T2
  ON T1.player_fifa_api_id = T2.player_fifa_api_id
JOIN Player AS T4
  ON T3.player_api_id = T4.player_api_id
WHERE
  T1.potential = (
    SELECT
      MIN(T3.potential)
    FROM Player_Attributes AS T3
    JOIN Player AS T4
      ON T3.player_api_id = T4.player_api_id

SELECT
  preferred_foot
FROM (
  SELECT
    player_api_id,
    preferred_foot,
    MIN(potential) AS min_potential
  FROM Player_Attributes
  GROUP BY
    player_api_id
  ORDER BY
    min_potential ASC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 1
) AS _subquery
GROUP BY
  player_api_id
ORDER BY
  min_potential ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  L.name,
  COUNT(M.id) AS match_count
FROM Match AS M
JOIN League AS L
  ON M.league_id = L.id
GROUP BY
  M.league_id
HAVING
  COUNT(M.id) = (
    SELECT
      MAX(cnt)
    FROM (
      SELECT
        COUNT(id) AS cnt
      FROM Match
      GROUP BY
        league_id
    ) AS _subquery
    GROUP BY
      league_id
  )

SELECT
  T1.player_name
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2
  ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE
  T1.height = (
    SELECT
      MAX(height)
    FROM Player
  )
  OR T1.height = (
    SELECT
      MIN(height)
    FROM Player
  )
GROUP BY
  T1.player_name
ORDER BY
  AVG(T2.finishing) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  player_name
FROM (
  SELECT
    T1.player_name,
    AVG(T2.finishing) AS avg_finishing
  FROM Player AS T1
  JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2
    ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
  WHERE
    T1.height = (
      SELECT
        MAX(height)
      FROM Player
    )
  GROUP BY
    T1.player_name
) AS _subquery
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2
  ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2
  ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE
  T1.height = (
    SELECT
      MAX(height)
    FROM Player
  )
GROUP BY
  T1.player_name
ORDER BY
  avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN T1.height = (
      SELECT
        MAX(height)
      FROM Player
    )
    THEN 'tallest'
    ELSE 'shortest'
  END AS player_type,
  AVG(T2.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2
  ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE
  T1.height = (
    SELECT
      MAX(height)
    FROM Player
  )
  OR T1.height = (
    SELECT
      MIN(height)
    FROM Player
  )
GROUP BY
  player_type
ORDER BY
  avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1

  ON L.country_id = C.id
WHERE
  M.season = '2008/2009'
GROUP BY
  L.name
ORDER BY
  COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT
  L.name
FROM League AS L
WHERE
  L.id = (
    SELECT
      M.league_id
    FROM Match AS M
    WHERE
      M.season = '2008/2009'
    GROUP BY
      M.league_id
    ORDER BY
      COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
GROUP BY
  M.league_id
ORDER BY
  COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  L.name,
  COUNT(*) AS match_count
FROM League AS L
JOIN Match AS M
  ON L.id = M.league_id
WHERE
  M.season = '2008/2009'
GROUP BY
  L.name
HAVING
  COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT
      MAX(cnt)
    FROM (
      SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
      FROM Match
      WHERE
        season = '2008/2009'
      GROUP BY
        league_id
    ) AS _subquery
    WHERE
      season = '2008/2009'
    GROUP BY
      league_id
  )

SELECT
  CAST(AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' THEN T2.overall_rating END) - AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN T2.overall_rating END) * 100.0 AS REAL) / AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN T2.overall_rating END)
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2
  ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE
  T1.player_name IN ('Ariel Borysiuk', 'Paulin Puel')

SELECT
  CAST((
    SELECT
      T2.overall_rating
    FROM Player AS T1
    JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2
      ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
    WHERE
      T1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk'
    LIMIT 1
  ) - (
    SELECT
      T2.overall_rating
    FROM Player AS T1
    JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2
      ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
    WHERE
      T1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel'
    LIMIT 1
  ) * 100.0 AS REAL) / (
    SELECT
      T2.overall_rating
    FROM Player AS T1
    JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2
      ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
    WHERE
      T1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel'
    LIMIT 1
  )
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2
  ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2
  ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2
  ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE
  T1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel'
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  CAST((
    SELECT
      pa.overall_rating
    FROM Player_Attributes AS pa
    JOIN Player AS p
      ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
    WHERE
      p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', pa.date) = '2013-07-12'
  ) - (
    SELECT
      pa.overall_rating
    FROM Player_Attributes AS pa
    JOIN Player AS p
      ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
    WHERE
      p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', pa.date) = '2013-07-12'
  ) * 100.0 AS REAL) / (
    SELECT
      pa.overall_rating
    FROM Player_Attributes AS pa
    JOIN Player AS p
      ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
    WHERE
      p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', pa.date) = '2013-07-12'
  ) AS percentage
FROM Player_Attributes AS pa
JOIN Player AS p
  ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
JOIN Player AS p
  ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
JOIN Player AS p
  ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE
  p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', pa.date) = '2013-07-12'

SELECT
  CAST(pa1.overall_rating - pa2.overall_rating * 100.0 AS REAL) / pa2.overall_rating AS percentage
FROM Player AS p1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa1
  ON p1.player_api_id = pa1.player_api_id
JOIN Player AS p2
  ON TRUE
JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa2
  ON p2.player_api_id = pa2.player_api_id
WHERE
  p1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
  AND p2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
  AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', pa1.date) = '2013-07-12'
  AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', pa2.date) = '2013-07-12'

SELECT
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN pa.overall_rating END) - MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' THEN pa.overall_rating END) * 100.0 AS REAL) / MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN pa.overall_rating END) AS percentage
FROM Player_Attributes AS pa
JOIN Player AS p
  ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE
  p.player_name IN ('Landon Donovan', 'Jordan Bowery')
  AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', pa.date) = '2013-07-12'

SELECT
  CAST(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
FROM Patient
WHERE
  SEX = 'M'

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN (
      SELECT
        COUNT(ID)
      FROM Patient
      WHERE
        SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+'
    ) > (
      SELECT
        COUNT(ID)
      FROM Patient
      WHERE
        SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-'
    )
    THEN 'in-patient'
    ELSE 'outpatient'
  END,
  CAST(CAST((
    SELECT
      COUNT(ID)
    FROM Patient
    WHERE
      SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+'
  ) AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) / (
    SELECT
      COUNT(ID)
    FROM Patient
    WHERE
      SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-'
  )
FROM Patient
WHERE
  SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-'

SELECT
  MAX(STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday)) - MIN(STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday)) AS age_gap
FROM Patient AS T1
JOIN Laboratory AS T2
  ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE
  T2.TG >= 200

SELECT
  MAX(STRFTIME('%Y', P.Birthday)) - MIN(STRFTIME('%Y', P.Birthday)) AS age_gap
FROM Patient AS P
WHERE
  P.ID IN (
    SELECT
      L.ID
    FROM Laboratory AS L
    WHERE
      L.TG >= 200
  )

SELECT
  (
    SELECT
      STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday)
    FROM Patient AS T1
    JOIN Laboratory AS T2
      ON T1.ID = T2.ID
    WHERE
      T2.TG >= 200
    ORDER BY
      T1.Birthday DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) - (
    SELECT
      STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday)
    FROM Patient AS T1
    JOIN Laboratory AS T2
      ON T1.ID = T2.ID
    WHERE
      T2.TG >= 200
    ORDER BY
      T1.Birthday ASC NULLS LAST
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS age_gap
FROM Patient AS T1
JOIN Laboratory AS T2
  ON T1.ID = T2.ID
JOIN Laboratory AS T2
  ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE
  T2.TG >= 200
ORDER BY
  T1.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1

  GROUP BY

  HAVING
    STRFTIME('%Y', MIN(T2."Examination Date")) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1."First Date") >= 1

JOIN Examination AS T2
  ON T1.ID = T2.ID
GROUP BY

SELECT
  CAST(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 AS REAL) / COUNT(*)
FROM Laboratory
WHERE
  "U-PRO" > 0 AND "U-PRO" < 30

SELECT
  CAST(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 AS REAL) / COUNT(*)
FROM Laboratory AS T1
JOIN Patient AS T2
  ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE
  T1."U-PRO" > 0 AND T1."U-PRO" < 30

  CAST((
    SELECT
      COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID)
    FROM Laboratory AS T1
    JOIN Patient AS T2
      ON T1.ID = T2.ID
    WHERE
      T1."U-PRO" > 0 AND T1."U-PRO" < 30 AND T1.UA <= 6.5
  ) * 100.0 AS REAL) / (
    SELECT
      COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID)
    FROM Laboratory AS T1
    JOIN Patient AS T2
      ON T1.ID = T2.ID
    WHERE
      T1."U-PRO" > 0 AND T1."U-PRO" < 30

SELECT

  T2.ALB,
  CASE WHEN T2.ALB BETWEEN 3.5 AND 5.5 THEN 'Normal' ELSE 'Abnormal' END AS "ALB Status"
FROM Patient AS T1
JOIN Laboratory AS T2
  ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE
  STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) = '1982'

SELECT
  T1.ID,
  IIF(T2.ALB BETWEEN 3.5 AND 5.5, 'Within Normal Range', 'Out of Normal Range') AS "Albumin Status"
FROM Patient AS T1

  ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE
  STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) = '1982'

SELECT

FROM Patient AS T1

  STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) = '1982'

  T1.ID

SELECT
  AVG(T1.UA)
FROM Laboratory AS T1
JOIN Patient AS T2
  ON T1.ID = T2.ID
JOIN (
  SELECT
    ID,
    MAX(Date) AS latest_date
  FROM Laboratory
  GROUP BY
    ID
) AS T3
  ON T1.ID = T3.ID AND T1.Date = T3.latest_date
WHERE
  NOT T1.UA IS NULL
  AND (
    T2.SEX = 'M' AND T1.UA < 8.0 OR T2.SEX = 'F' AND T1.UA < 6.5
  )
GROUP BY
  ID

SELECT

    SELECT
      COUNT(DISTINCT ID)
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE
      PLT < 100
  ) - (
    SELECT
      COUNT(DISTINCT ID)
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE
      PLT > 400
  ) AS calculation
FROM Laboratory
WHERE
  PLT < 100

SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS calculation
FROM Laboratory
WHERE
  PLT <= 100 OR PLT >= 400

SELECT
  d.A2 AS district_name,
  d.A3 AS state,
  CAST(d.A13 - d.A12 * 100.0 AS REAL) / d.A12 AS unemployment_increment_pct
FROM loan AS l
JOIN account AS a
  ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp AS dp
  ON a.account_id = dp.account_id
JOIN client AS c
  ON dp.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district AS d
  ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE
  l.status = 'D'

SELECT
  d.A2 AS district_name,
  d.A3 AS state,
  CAST(d.A13 - d.A12 * 100.0 AS REAL) / d.A12 AS unemployment_increment_pct
FROM loan AS l
JOIN account AS a
  ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district AS d
  ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE
  l.status = 'D'

  ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp AS dp
  ON a.account_id = dp.account_id
JOIN client AS c

  ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE
  l.status = 'D'

SELECT
  CAST(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.A2 = 'Decin' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.account_id)
FROM account AS T1
JOIN district AS T2
  ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
WHERE
  STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1993'

FROM account AS a

  ON a.account_id = dp.account_id
JOIN client AS c
  ON dp.client_id = c.client_id

  STRFTIME('%Y', a.date) = '1993'

SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2019' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2020' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM event AS T1
JOIN budget AS T2
  ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event

SELECT
  (
    SELECT
      SUM(T2.spent)
    FROM event AS T1
    JOIN budget AS T2
      ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
    WHERE
      STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2019'
  ) - (
    SELECT
      SUM(T2.spent)
    FROM event AS T1
    JOIN budget AS T2
      ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
    WHERE
      STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2020'
  ) AS difference
FROM event AS T1
JOIN budget AS T2
  ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
JOIN budget AS T2
  ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
WHERE
  STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2019'

SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T3.event_date) = '2019' THEN T1.cost ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T3.event_date) = '2020' THEN T1.cost ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM expense AS T1
JOIN budget AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id
JOIN event AS T3
  ON T2.link_to_event = T3.event_id

SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.expense_date) = '2019' THEN T1.cost ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.expense_date) = '2020' THEN T1.cost ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM expense AS T1

SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.expense_date) = '2019' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.expense_date) = '2020' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM expense AS T1
JOIN budget AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id

SELECT DISTINCT
  SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2019' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2020' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM event AS T1
JOIN budget AS T2
  ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event

SELECT DISTINCT
  (
    SELECT
      SUM(T2.spent)
    FROM event AS T1
    JOIN budget AS T2
      ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
    WHERE
      STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2019'
  ) - (
    SELECT
      SUM(T2.spent)
    FROM event AS T1
    JOIN budget AS T2
      ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
    WHERE
      STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2020'
  ) AS difference
FROM event AS T1
JOIN budget AS T2
  ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
JOIN budget AS T2
  ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
WHERE
  STRFTIME('%Y', T1.event_date) = '2019'

SELECT DISTINCT
  SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T3.event_date) = '2019' THEN T1.cost ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T3.event_date) = '2020' THEN T1.cost ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM expense AS T1
JOIN budget AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id
JOIN event AS T3
  ON T2.link_to_event = T3.event_id

SELECT DISTINCT
  SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.expense_date) = '2019' THEN T1.cost ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.expense_date) = '2020' THEN T1.cost ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM expense AS T1

SELECT DISTINCT

SELECT
  CAST((
    SELECT
      SUM(T1.amount)
    FROM budget AS T1
    JOIN event AS T2
      ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
    WHERE
      T1.category = 'Advertisement' AND T2.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
  ) AS REAL) / (
    SELECT
      SUM(T1.amount)
    FROM budget AS T1
    JOIN event AS T2
      ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
    WHERE
      T1.category = 'Advertisement' AND T2.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  )
FROM budget AS T1
JOIN event AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
JOIN event AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
WHERE
  T1.category = 'Advertisement' AND T2.event_name = 'October Meeting'

SELECT
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.event_name = 'October Meeting' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END)
FROM budget AS T1
JOIN event AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
WHERE
  T1.category = 'Advertisement'

SELECT
  CAST(T1.amount AS REAL) / T2.amount
FROM budget AS T1
JOIN event AS E1
  ON T1.link_to_event = E1.event_id
CROSS JOIN budget AS T2
JOIN event AS E2
  ON T2.link_to_event = E2.event_id
WHERE
  T1.category = 'Advertisement'
  AND T2.category = 'Advertisement'
  AND E1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
  AND E2.event_name = 'October Meeting'

SELECT DISTINCT
  CAST((
    SELECT
      SUM(T1.amount)
    FROM budget AS T1
    JOIN event AS T2
      ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
    WHERE
      T1.category = 'Advertisement' AND T2.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
  ) AS REAL) / (
    SELECT
      SUM(T1.amount)
    FROM budget AS T1
    JOIN event AS T2
      ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
    WHERE
      T1.category = 'Advertisement' AND T2.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  )
FROM budget AS T1
JOIN event AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
JOIN event AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
WHERE
  T1.category = 'Advertisement' AND T2.event_name = 'October Meeting'

SELECT DISTINCT
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.event_name = 'October Meeting' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END)
FROM budget AS T1
JOIN event AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
WHERE
  T1.category = 'Advertisement'

SELECT DISTINCT
  CAST(T1.amount AS REAL) / T2.amount
FROM budget AS T1
JOIN event AS E1
  ON T1.link_to_event = E1.event_id
CROSS JOIN budget AS T2

  ON T2.link_to_event = E2.event_id
WHERE
  T1.category = 'Advertisement'
  AND T2.category = 'Advertisement'
  AND E1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
  AND E2.event_name = 'October Meeting'

SELECT

FROM budget AS T1
JOIN event AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
WHERE
  T2.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY
  CAST(T1.spent AS REAL) / T1.amount DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  T2.event_name
FROM budget AS T1
JOIN event AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
WHERE
  T2.status = 'Closed'
GROUP BY
  T2.event_id,
  T2.event_name
ORDER BY
  CAST(SUM(T1.spent) * 1.0 AS REAL) / SUM(T1.amount) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  T2.event_name
FROM budget AS T1
JOIN event AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id
JOIN event AS E
  ON B.link_to_event = E.event_id
WHERE
  T2.status = 'Closed'
  AND CAST(T1.spent AS REAL) / T1.amount = (
    SELECT
      MAX(CAST(B.spent AS REAL) / B.amount)
    FROM budget AS B
    JOIN event AS E
      ON B.link_to_event = E.event_id
    WHERE
      E.status = 'Closed'
  )

SELECT
  CAST(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T3.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN T1.cost ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) / SUM(T1.cost)
FROM expense AS T1
JOIN budget AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id
JOIN event AS T3
  ON T2.link_to_event = T3.event_id

SELECT
  CAST(CAST(yk.total_cost AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) / all_cost.total_cost
FROM (
  SELECT
    SUM(T1.cost) AS total_cost
  FROM expense AS T1
  JOIN budget AS T2
    ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id
  JOIN event AS T3
    ON T2.link_to_event = T3.event_id
  WHERE
    T3.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
) AS yk
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    SUM(cost) AS total_cost
  FROM expense
) AS all_cost
JOIN budget AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id
JOIN event AS T3
  ON T2.link_to_event = T3.event_id
WHERE
  T3.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'

      ON T4.link_to_budget = T5.budget_id
    JOIN event AS T6

  )

JOIN budget AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id
JOIN event AS T3

JOIN budget AS T5

JOIN event AS T6

WHERE

LIMIT 1

SELECT
  t_shirt_size,
  COUNT(t_shirt_size) AS cnt
FROM member
GROUP BY
  t_shirt_size
HAVING
  COUNT(t_shirt_size) = (
    SELECT
      MAX(c)
    FROM (
      SELECT
        COUNT(t_shirt_size) AS c
      FROM member
      GROUP BY
        t_shirt_size
    ) AS _subquery
    GROUP BY
      t_shirt_size
  )

SELECT
  CAST(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.remaining < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.link_to_event)
FROM budget AS T1

SELECT
  CAST(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.remaining < 0 THEN T1.link_to_event END) AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.event_id)
FROM budget AS T1
RIGHT JOIN event AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id

SELECT
  CAST(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.remaining < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.budget_id)
FROM budget AS T1
JOIN event AS T2
  ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id

SELECT
  CAST(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN over_budget > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) / COUNT(*)
FROM (
  SELECT
    T1.link_to_event,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.remaining < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS over_budget
  FROM budget AS T1
  GROUP BY
    T1.link_to_event
) AS _subquery
GROUP BY
  T1.link_to_event

SELECT
  CAST(CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.remaining < 0 THEN T1.link_to_event END) AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.event_id)
FROM event AS T2
LEFT JOIN budget AS T1
  ON T2.event_id = T1.link_to_event

SELECT

FROM customers

    SELECT
      COUNT(*)
    FROM customers
    WHERE
      Currency = 'EUR'

      Currency = 'CZK'
  )
FROM customers
WHERE
  Currency = 'CZK'

SELECT

  T1.CustomerID

  SUM(T1.Consumption) ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  T1.Segment,
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS PercentageIncrease
FROM customers AS T1
JOIN yearmonth AS T2
  ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE
  T1.Currency = 'EUR' AND T1.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
GROUP BY
  T1.Segment
ORDER BY
  PercentageIncrease DESC

SELECT
  A.Segment,
  CAST(B.Total2013 - A.Total2012 * 100.0 AS REAL) / B.Total2013 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM (
  SELECT
    T1.Segment,
    SUM(T2.Consumption) AS Total2012
  FROM customers AS T1
  JOIN yearmonth AS T2
    ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
  WHERE
    T1.Currency = 'EUR' AND SUBSTRING(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2012'
  GROUP BY
    T1.Segment
) AS A
JOIN (
  SELECT
    T1.Segment,
    SUM(T2.Consumption) AS Total2013
  FROM customers AS T1
  JOIN yearmonth AS T2
    ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
  WHERE
    T1.Currency = 'EUR' AND SUBSTRING(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
  GROUP BY
    T1.Segment
) AS B
  ON A.Segment = B.Segment
JOIN yearmonth AS T2
  ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth AS T2
  ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE
  A.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
GROUP BY
  T1.Segment
ORDER BY
  PercentageIncrease DESC

SELECT
  Segment,
  CAST(SUM(Consumption2013 - Consumption2012) * 100.0 AS REAL) / SUM(Consumption2013) AS PercentageIncrease
FROM (
  SELECT
    T1.CustomerID,
    T1.Segment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption2012,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption2013
  FROM customers AS T1
  JOIN yearmonth AS T2
    ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
  WHERE
    T1.Currency = 'EUR' AND T1.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
  GROUP BY
    T1.CustomerID,
    T1.Segment
) AS _subquery
JOIN yearmonth AS T2
  ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE
  T1.Currency = 'EUR' AND T1.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
GROUP BY
  Segment
ORDER BY
  PercentageIncrease DESC

SELECT DISTINCT
  A.Segment,
  CAST(B.Total2013 - A.Total2012 * 100.0 AS REAL) / B.Total2013 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM (
  SELECT
    T1.Segment,
    SUM(T2.Consumption) AS Total2012
  FROM customers AS T1
  JOIN yearmonth AS T2
    ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
  WHERE
    T1.Currency = 'EUR' AND SUBSTRING(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2012'
  GROUP BY
    T1.Segment
) AS A

  SELECT
    T1.Segment,
    SUM(T2.Consumption) AS Total2013
  FROM customers AS T1
  JOIN yearmonth AS T2
    ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
  WHERE
    T1.Currency = 'EUR' AND SUBSTRING(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
  GROUP BY
    T1.Segment
) AS B
  ON A.Segment = B.Segment
JOIN yearmonth AS T2
  ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth AS T2
  ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE
  A.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')

  T1.Segment
ORDER BY
  PercentageIncrease DESC

SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN Country = 'CZE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN Country = 'SVK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS diff
FROM gasstations
WHERE
  Segment = 'Discount'

SELECT
  (
    SELECT
      COUNT(*)
    FROM gasstations
    WHERE
      Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'Discount'
  ) - (
    SELECT
      COUNT(*)
    FROM gasstations
    WHERE
      Country = 'SVK' AND Segment = 'Discount'
  ) AS diff
FROM gasstations
WHERE
  Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'Discount'

SELECT
  cze.cnt - svk.cnt AS diff
FROM (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM gasstations
  WHERE
    Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'Discount'
) AS cze
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM gasstations
  WHERE
    Country = 'SVK' AND Segment = 'Discount'
) AS svk
WHERE
  Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'Discount'

SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN Country = 'CZE' THEN 1 WHEN Country = 'SVK' THEN -1 ELSE 0 END) AS diff
FROM gasstations
WHERE
  Segment = 'Discount'

SELECT DISTINCT
  cze.cnt - svk.cnt AS diff
FROM (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM gasstations
  WHERE
    Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'Discount'
) AS cze
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM gasstations
  WHERE
    Country = 'SVK' AND Segment = 'Discount'
) AS svk
WHERE
  Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'Discount'

WHERE
  Segment = 'Discount'

SELECT
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1997' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END)
FROM loan AS T1
JOIN account AS T2
  ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN disp AS T3
  ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN client AS T4
  ON T3.client_id = T4.client_id
WHERE
  T4.gender = 'M' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) IN ('1996', '1997')

SELECT
  CAST(s97.total - s96.total AS REAL) / s96.total * 100
FROM (
  SELECT
    SUM(T1.amount) AS total
  FROM loan AS T1
  JOIN disp AS T2
    ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
  JOIN client AS T3
    ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
  WHERE
    T3.gender = 'M' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1996'
) AS s96
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    SUM(T1.amount) AS total
  FROM loan AS T1
  JOIN disp AS T2
    ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
  JOIN client AS T3
    ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
  WHERE
    T3.gender = 'M' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1997'
) AS s97
JOIN disp AS T2
  ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN client AS T3
  ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
JOIN disp AS T2
  ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN client AS T3
  ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
WHERE
  T3.gender = 'M' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1996'

SELECT
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1997' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END)

SELECT
  AVG(oxygen_count)
FROM (
  SELECT
    T1.molecule_id,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'o' THEN 1 END) AS oxygen_count
  FROM atom AS T1
  JOIN bond AS T2
    ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
  WHERE
    T2.bond_type = '-'
  GROUP BY
    T1.molecule_id
) AS _subquery
JOIN bond AS T2
  ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE
  T2.bond_type = '-'
GROUP BY
  T1.molecule_id

SELECT

FROM (
  SELECT
    m.label,
    COUNT(b.bond_id) AS cnt
  FROM molecule AS m
  JOIN bond AS b
    ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
  WHERE
    b.bond_type = '='
  GROUP BY
    m.molecule_id
  ORDER BY
    cnt DESC
  LIMIT 1
) AS T
JOIN bond AS b
  ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE
  b.bond_type = '='
GROUP BY
  m.molecule_id
ORDER BY

LIMIT 1

SELECT
  CASE WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END
FROM molecule AS m
WHERE
  m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT
      molecule_id
    FROM bond
    WHERE
      bond_type = '='
    GROUP BY
      molecule_id
    HAVING
      COUNT(bond_id) = (
        SELECT
          MAX(cnt)
        FROM (
          SELECT
            COUNT(bond_id) AS cnt
          FROM bond
          WHERE
            bond_type = '='
          GROUP BY
            molecule_id
        ) AS _subquery
        WHERE
          bond_type = '='
        GROUP BY
          molecule_id
      )
  )
GROUP BY
  molecule_id
HAVING
  COUNT(bond_id) = (
    SELECT
      MAX(cnt)
    FROM (
      SELECT
        COUNT(bond_id) AS cnt
      FROM bond
      WHERE
        bond_type = '='
      GROUP BY
        molecule_id
    ) AS _subquery
    WHERE
      bond_type = '='
    GROUP BY
      molecule_id
  )

SELECT

SELECT
  name,
  convertedManaCost
FROM cards
WHERE
  name = 'Serra Angel' OR name = 'Shrine Keeper'
ORDER BY
  convertedManaCost DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  name
FROM cards
WHERE
  name IN ('Serra Angel', 'Shrine Keeper')
ORDER BY
  convertedManaCost DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN S.convertedManaCost > K.convertedManaCost
    THEN 'Serra Angel'
    WHEN K.convertedManaCost > S.convertedManaCost
    THEN 'Shrine Keeper'
    ELSE 'Equal'
  END AS higher_cost
FROM cards AS S
CROSS JOIN cards AS K
WHERE
  S.name = 'Serra Angel' AND K.name = 'Shrine Keeper'

SELECT
  name,
  convertedManaCost
FROM cards

  name = 'Serra Angel' OR name = 'Shrine Keeper'

SELECT
  schools.School,
  schools.ClosedDate
FROM schools
WHERE
  schools.StatusType = 'Closed'
  AND schools.County = (
    SELECT
      County
    FROM schools
    WHERE
      StatusType = 'Closed'
    GROUP BY
      County
    ORDER BY
      COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
GROUP BY
  County
ORDER BY
  COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

  AND T2.County = (

ORDER BY
  COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT

  T2.text,
  CASE WHEN T1.hasContentWarning = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS has_missing_or_degraded_properties
FROM cards AS T1
JOIN rulings AS T2
  ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid
WHERE
  T1.artist = 'Jim Pavelec'

SELECT
  T1.name,
  T2.text,
  CASE
    WHEN T1.hasContentWarning = 1
    THEN 'has missing or degraded properties and values'
    ELSE 'does not have missing or degraded properties and values'
  END
FROM cards AS T1
LEFT JOIN rulings AS T2
  ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid
WHERE
  T1.artist = 'Jim Pavelec'

SELECT
  T1.name,
  T2.text,
  T2.date,
  CASE WHEN T1.hasContentWarning = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS has_missing_or_degraded
FROM cards AS T1
JOIN rulings AS T2
  ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid
WHERE
  T1.artist = 'Jim Pavelec'

SELECT
  T1.name,
  GROUP_CONCAT(T2.text, '; ') AS ruling_texts,
  CASE WHEN T1.hasContentWarning = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS has_missing_or_degraded
FROM cards AS T1
JOIN rulings AS T2
  ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid
WHERE
  T1.artist = 'Jim Pavelec'
GROUP BY
  T1.name,
  T1.hasContentWarning

SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.name,
  T2.text,
  CASE
    WHEN T1.hasContentWarning = 1
    THEN 'has missing or degraded properties and values'
    ELSE 'does not have missing or degraded properties and values'
  END
FROM cards AS T1
LEFT JOIN rulings AS T2
  ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid
WHERE
  T1.artist = 'Jim Pavelec'

SELECT DISTINCT

  CASE WHEN T1.hasContentWarning = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS has_missing_or_degraded
FROM cards AS T1
JOIN rulings AS T2
  ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid
WHERE
  T1.artist = 'Jim Pavelec'
GROUP BY
  T1.name,
  T1.hasContentWarning

SELECT
  T1.name
FROM sets AS T1
JOIN set_translations AS T2
  ON T1.code = T2.setCode
WHERE
  T2.language = 'Korean'
  AND NOT T1.code IN (
    SELECT
      setCode
    FROM set_translations
    WHERE
      language LIKE '%Japanese%'
  )

SELECT
  T1.name
FROM sets AS T1
JOIN set_translations AS T2
  ON T1.code = T2.setCode
GROUP BY
  T1.code,
  T1.name
HAVING
  SUM(CASE WHEN T2.language = 'Korean' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
  AND SUM(CASE WHEN T2.language LIKE '%Japanese%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

SELECT
  T1.name
FROM sets AS T1
JOIN set_translations AS T2
  ON T1.code = T2.setCode
LEFT JOIN set_translations AS T3
  ON T1.code = T3.setCode AND T3.language LIKE '%Japanese%'
WHERE
  T2.language = 'Korean' AND T3.id IS NULL

      ON T3.code = T4.setCode

SELECT
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN County = 'Colusa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN County = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio
FROM schools
WHERE
  MailState = 'CA'

SELECT
  CAST((
    SELECT
      COUNT(*)
    FROM schools
    WHERE
      County = 'Colusa' AND MailState = 'CA'
  ) * 1.0 AS REAL) / (
    SELECT
      COUNT(*)
    FROM schools
    WHERE
      County = 'Humboldt' AND MailState = 'CA'
  ) AS ratio
FROM schools
WHERE
  County = 'Humboldt' AND MailState = 'CA'

SELECT
  CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1."County Name" = 'Colusa' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1."County Name" = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 END) AS ratio
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2
  ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE
  T2.MailState = 'CA'

SELECT
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.cname = 'Colusa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T1.cname = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio
FROM satscores AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2
  ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode
WHERE
  T2.MailState = 'CA'

SELECT
  CAST(colusa.cnt AS REAL) / humboldt.cnt
FROM (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM schools
  WHERE
    County = 'Colusa' AND MailState = 'CA'
) AS colusa
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM schools
  WHERE
    County = 'Humboldt' AND MailState = 'CA'
) AS humboldt
WHERE
  County = 'Colusa' AND MailState = 'CA'

SELECT
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.County = 'Colusa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.County = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2
  ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
JOIN satscores AS T3
  ON T2.CDSCode = T3.cds
WHERE
  T2.MailState = 'CA'

SELECT DISTINCT
  CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1."County Name" = 'Colusa' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1."County Name" = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 END) AS ratio

JOIN schools AS T2
  ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE
  T2.MailState = 'CA'

  ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode

FROM (

    COUNT(T1.Id) AS badge_count
  FROM badges AS T1
  JOIN users AS T2
    ON T1.UserId = T2.Id
  WHERE
    T2.Views > 200
  GROUP BY
    T2.Id
) AS _subquery
JOIN users AS T2
  ON T1.UserId = T2.Id
WHERE
  T2.Views > 200
GROUP BY
  T2.Id

FROM badges AS T1

  JOIN users AS T2

  WHERE
    T2.Views > 200
  GROUP BY
    T2.Id
) AS _subquery
JOIN users AS T2
  ON T1.UserId = T2.Id
WHERE
  T2.Views > 200
GROUP BY
  T2.Id

SELECT
  T2.UserId
FROM (
  SELECT
    UserId,
    MAX(cnt) AS max_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT
      UserId,
      PostId,
      COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM postHistory
    GROUP BY
      UserId,
      PostId
  ) AS _subquery
  GROUP BY
    UserId
  HAVING
    MAX(cnt) = 1
) AS T2
JOIN users AS T3
  ON T2.UserId = T3.Id
WHERE
  T3.Views >= 1000
GROUP BY
  UserId
HAVING
  MAX(cnt) = 1

  ON T1.UserId = T2.Id
WHERE
  T1.Score BETWEEN 5 AND 10

    SELECT
      COUNT(*)
    FROM comments AS C
    JOIN users AS U
      ON C.UserId = U.Id
    WHERE
      C.Score BETWEEN 5 AND 10 AND U.UpVotes = 0
  ) AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) / (
    SELECT
      COUNT(*)
    FROM comments AS C
    JOIN users AS U
      ON C.UserId = U.Id
    WHERE
      C.Score BETWEEN 5 AND 10
  )
FROM comments AS C

JOIN users AS U
  ON C.UserId = U.Id
WHERE
  C.Score BETWEEN 5 AND 10

SELECT
  (
    SELECT
      CAST(CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) / (
        SELECT
          COUNT(*)
        FROM superhero
      )
    FROM superhero AS T1
    JOIN alignment AS T2
      ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
    WHERE
      T2.alignment = 'Bad'
  ) AS percentage,
  COUNT(T1.id) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN alignment AS T2
  ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
JOIN publisher AS T3
  ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id
JOIN alignment AS T2
  ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
WHERE
  T2.alignment = 'Bad' AND T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'

SELECT
  CAST(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.id) AS percentage,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN T2.alignment = 'Bad' AND T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
      THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN alignment AS T2
  ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
JOIN publisher AS T3
  ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id

SELECT DISTINCT
  (
    SELECT
      CAST(CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) / (
        SELECT
          COUNT(*)

    FROM superhero AS T1
    JOIN alignment AS T2
      ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
    WHERE
      T2.alignment = 'Bad'
  ) AS percentage,

FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN alignment AS T2
  ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id

    FROM superhero
  ) AS percentage,
  (
    SELECT
      COUNT(*)
    FROM superhero AS S1
    JOIN alignment AS S2
      ON S1.alignment_id = S2.id
    JOIN publisher AS S3
      ON S1.publisher_id = S3.id
    WHERE
      S2.alignment = 'Bad' AND S3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
  ) AS marvel_count
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN alignment AS T2
  ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
JOIN alignment AS S2
  ON S1.alignment_id = S2.id
JOIN publisher AS S3
  ON S1.publisher_id = S3.id
WHERE
  T2.alignment = 'Bad'

  SUM(

      THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS marvel_count

SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN publisher AS T2
  ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id

SELECT
  (
    SELECT
      COUNT(*)
    FROM superhero AS T1
    JOIN publisher AS T2
      ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
    WHERE
      T2.publisher_name = 'DC Comics'
  ) - (
    SELECT
      COUNT(*)
    FROM superhero AS T1
    JOIN publisher AS T2
      ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
    WHERE
      T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
  ) AS difference
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN publisher AS T2
  ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
JOIN publisher AS T2
  ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
WHERE
  T2.publisher_name = 'DC Comics'

SELECT
  dc.cnt - marvel.cnt AS difference
FROM (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM superhero
  WHERE
    publisher_id = (
      SELECT
        id
      FROM publisher
      WHERE
        publisher_name = 'DC Comics'
    )
) AS dc
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM superhero
  WHERE
    publisher_id = (
      SELECT
        id
      FROM publisher
      WHERE
        publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
    )
) AS marvel
WHERE
  publisher_id = (
    SELECT
      id
    FROM publisher
    WHERE
      publisher_name = 'DC Comics'
  )

SELECT
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics'
      THEN 1
      WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
      THEN -1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS difference
FROM superhero AS s
JOIN publisher AS p
  ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE
  p.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics')

  FROM schools
  WHERE
    NOT AdmFName1 IS NULL
) AS _subquery
WHERE
  NOT AdmFName1 IS NULL
GROUP BY
  T.name
ORDER BY
  COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 2

SELECT
  T1.AdmFName1,
  T1.District
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN (
  SELECT
    AdmFName1,
    COUNT(*) AS c
  FROM schools
  WHERE
    NOT AdmFName1 IS NULL
  GROUP BY
    AdmFName1
  ORDER BY
    c DESC
  LIMIT 2
) AS T2
  ON T1.AdmFName1 = T2.AdmFName1
WHERE
  NOT AdmFName1 IS NULL
GROUP BY
  T1.AdmFName1,
  T1.District
ORDER BY
  c DESC
LIMIT 2

SELECT

FROM qualifying AS T1

  ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId
WHERE
  T1.raceId = 19 AND NOT T1.q2 IS NULL
ORDER BY
  T1.q2 ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1

JOIN drivers AS T2
  ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId
WHERE

    SELECT
      MIN(q2)
    FROM qualifying
    WHERE
      raceId = 19 AND NOT q2 IS NULL
  )

LIMIT 1

LIMIT 1

LIMIT 1

FROM races AS T1
JOIN circuits AS T3
  ON T1.circuitId = T3.circuitId
WHERE
  T1.year = 2017
  AND NOT T3.circuitId IN (
    SELECT
      T2.circuitId
    FROM races AS T2
    WHERE
      T2.year = 2000
  )

SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.name
FROM races AS T1
JOIN circuits AS T3
  ON T1.circuitId = T3.circuitId
JOIN races AS T2
  ON T4.circuitId = T2.circuitId
WHERE
  T1.year = 2017
  AND NOT T3.name IN (
    SELECT
      T4.name
    FROM circuits AS T4
    JOIN races AS T2
      ON T4.circuitId = T2.circuitId
    WHERE
      T2.year = 2000
  )

SELECT
  T2.country,
  T2.name,
  T2.location
FROM races AS T1
JOIN circuits AS T2
  ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId
WHERE
  T1.name = 'European Grand Prix'
ORDER BY
  T1.year ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  T2.country,
  T2.name,
  T2.location
FROM races AS T1
JOIN circuits AS T2
  ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId
WHERE
  T1.name = 'European Grand Prix'
  AND T1.year = (
    SELECT
      MIN(year)
    FROM races
    WHERE
      name = 'European Grand Prix'
  )

SELECT

WHERE
  T1.name = 'European Grand Prix'
GROUP BY

  T2.name,
  T2.location
ORDER BY

LIMIT 1

SELECT

  T1.driverId

  SUM(T2.wins) DESC

WHERE
  T2.position = 1
GROUP BY
  T1.driverId
ORDER BY
  COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

LIMIT 1

  MAX(T2.points) AS max_points

  ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId
WHERE
  T1.driverId = (
    SELECT
      driverId
    FROM driverStandings
    GROUP BY
      driverId
    ORDER BY
      SUM(wins) DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
GROUP BY
  driverId
ORDER BY
  SUM(wins) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  CASE WHEN AVG(A12) > AVG(A13) THEN '1995' ELSE '1996' END AS higher_year
FROM district

SELECT
  '1995' AS year,
  AVG(A12) AS avg_unemployment
FROM district
UNION ALL
SELECT
  '1996',
  AVG(A13)
FROM district

SELECT DISTINCT
  CASE WHEN AVG(A12) > AVG(A13) THEN '1995' ELSE '1996' END AS higher_year
FROM district

SELECT DISTINCT
  '1995' AS year,
  AVG(A12) AS avg_unemployment
FROM district
UNION ALL
SELECT
  '1996',
  AVG(A13)
FROM district

SELECT
  '1995' AS year,
  SUM(A12) AS avg_unemployment
FROM district
UNION ALL
SELECT
  '1996',
  AVG(A13)
FROM district

SELECT
  SUM(A12) AS avg_1995,
  AVG(A13) AS avg_1996
FROM district

SELECT

FROM circuits

  name IN ('Silverstone Circuit', 'Hockenheimring', 'Hungaroring')
ORDER BY
  lat DESC
LIMIT 1

  name
FROM circuits
WHERE
  name IN ('Silverstone Circuit', 'Hockenheimring', 'Hungaroring')
  AND lat = (
    SELECT
      MAX(lat)
    FROM circuits
    WHERE
      name IN ('Silverstone Circuit', 'Hockenheimring', 'Hungaroring')
  )

  name,
  MAX(lat)

  name IN ('Silverstone Circuit', 'Hockenheimring', 'Hungaroring')

LEFT JOIN circuits AS T2
  ON T2.name IN ('Silverstone Circuit', 'Hockenheimring', 'Hungaroring')

WHERE
  T1.name IN ('Silverstone Circuit', 'Hockenheimring', 'Hungaroring')
  AND T2.circuitId IS NULL

SELECT DISTINCT

SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT T1.district_id)
FROM district AS T1
JOIN client AS T2
  ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
WHERE
  T2.gender = 'F' AND T1.A11 > 6000 AND T1.A11 < 10000

SELECT
  COUNT(*)
FROM (
  SELECT
    T1.district_id
  FROM district AS T1
  JOIN client AS T2
    ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
  WHERE
    T2.gender = 'F' AND T1.A11 > 6000 AND T1.A11 < 10000
  GROUP BY
    T1.district_id
) AS _subquery
JOIN client AS T2
  ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
WHERE
  T2.gender = 'F' AND T1.A11 > 6000 AND T1.A11 < 10000
GROUP BY
  T1.district_id

SELECT DISTINCT

  ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
WHERE

SELECT
  T1.account_id,
  (
    SELECT
      MAX(A11)
    FROM district
  ) - (
    SELECT
      MIN(A11)
    FROM district
  ) AS gap
FROM account AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2
  ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN client AS T3
  ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
JOIN district AS T4
  ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE
  T3.gender = 'F'
  AND T4.A11 = (
    SELECT
      MIN(A11)
    FROM district
  )
  AND T3.birth_date = (
    SELECT
      MIN(birth_date)
    FROM client
    WHERE
      gender = 'F'
  )

SELECT
  T3.account_id,
  MAX(T4.A11) - MIN(T4.A11) AS gap
FROM client AS T1
JOIN district AS T4
  ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id
JOIN disp AS T2
  ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN account AS T3
  ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE
  T1.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY
  T3.account_id
HAVING
  T4.A11 = (
    SELECT
      MIN(A11)
    FROM district
  )
  AND T1.birth_date = (
    SELECT
      MIN(birth_date)
    FROM client
    WHERE
      gender = 'F'
  )

SELECT
  T1.account_id,
  (
    SELECT
      MAX(A11)
    FROM district
  ) - (
    SELECT
      MIN(A11)
    FROM district
  ) AS gap
FROM trans AS T1
JOIN account AS T2
  ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN disp AS T3
  ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN client AS T4
  ON T3.client_id = T4.client_id
JOIN district AS T5
  ON T4.district_id = T5.district_id
WHERE
  T4.gender = 'F'
  AND T5.A11 = (
    SELECT
      MIN(A11)
    FROM district
  )
  AND T4.birth_date = (
    SELECT
      MIN(birth_date)
    FROM client
    WHERE
      gender = 'F'
  )
GROUP BY
  T1.account_id

SELECT
  T1.forename,
  T1.surname,
  MIN(T2.time) AS earliest_lap_time
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN lapTimes AS T2
  ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId
WHERE
  T1.nationality = 'German' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.dob) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1990'
GROUP BY
  T1.driverId,
  T1.forename,
  T1.surname
ORDER BY
  MIN(T2.time) ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 3

  COUNT(*) AS times_held
FROM circuits AS T1
JOIN races AS T2
  ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId
WHERE
  T1.country = 'Austria'
GROUP BY
  T1.location,
  T1.lat,
  T1.lng

SELECT
  T1.raceId
FROM results AS T1
WHERE
  NOT T1.time IS NULL
GROUP BY
  T1.raceId
ORDER BY
  COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

  ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId
WHERE

ORDER BY

LIMIT 1

ORDER BY
  COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  T2.name,
  T1.milliseconds
FROM lapTimes AS T1
JOIN races AS T2
  ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId
WHERE
  T1.lap = 1
  AND T1.time = (
    SELECT
      MIN(time)
    FROM lapTimes
    WHERE
      lap = 1
  )

SELECT

  ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId
WHERE

ORDER BY
  T1.milliseconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1

GROUP BY

ORDER BY

SELECT
  SUM(T3.points) AS score,
  T4.name,
  T4.nationality
FROM races AS T1
JOIN constructorResults AS T3
  ON T1.raceId = T3.raceId
JOIN constructors AS T4
  ON T3.constructorId = T4.constructorId
WHERE
  T1.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND T1.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY
  T4.constructorId
ORDER BY
  score DESC
LIMIT 1
